title: stelis macilenta
intro: Stelis macilenta is a species of orchid native to Central America, particularly in countries such as Costa Rica and Panama. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis macilenta are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
